name: Three Ingredient Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the chocolate and peanut butter in a double boiler until the chocolate is completely melted.
2. Stir to combine the melted chocolate and peanut butter with the cereal.
3. Place spoonfuls of the cookie mixture onto wax paper-coated cookie sheets.
4. Place the trays in the freezer until the chocolate is hard and dry.
